Operation.xpath: Defs/RecipeDef[ recipeUsers/li[ text()="WeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="AdvWeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="MechWeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="WeaponsBench" or text()="HeavyArmsBench" or text()="GunsmithingBench" ] and not(starts-with(defName, "Build_RN")) and not(contains(defName, "Sword")) and not(contains(defName, "Knife")) and not(contains(defName, "Axe")) and not(contains(defName, "Mace")) and not(contains(defName, "Hammer")) and not(contains(defName, "Spear")) and not(contains(defName, "Club")) and not(contains(defName, "Blade")) and not(contains(defName, "Crossbow")) and not(contains(defName, "Bow_")) and not(contains(defName, "_Bow")) and not(contains(defName, "Arrow")) and not(contains(defName, "Melee")) and ( contains(defName, "MG") or contains(defName, "MachineGun") or contains(defName, "LMG") or contains(defName, "HMG") or contains(defName, "Launcher") or contains(defName, "Rocket") or contains(defName, "Spacer") or contains(defName, "AntiMaterial") or contains(defName, "AntiMateriel") or contains(defName, "AMR") or contains(defName, "Heavy") or contains(defName, "Cannon") or contains(defName, "Plasma") or contains(defName, "Mortar") or contains(defName, "Grenade") ) ]/recipeUsers

Defs/RecipeDef[ recipeUsers/li[ text()="WeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="AdvWeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="MechWeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="WeaponsBench" or text()="HeavyArmsBench" or text()="GunsmithingBench" ] and not(starts-with(defName, "Build_RN")) and not(contains(defName, "Sword")) and not(contains(defName, "Knife")) and not(contains(defName, "Axe")) and not(contains(defName, "Mace")) and not(contains(defName, "Hammer")) and not(contains(defName, "Spear")) and not(contains(defName, "Club")) and not(contains(defName, "Blade")) and not(contains(defName, "Crossbow")) and not(contains(defName, "Bow_")) and not(contains(defName, "_Bow")) and not(contains(defName, "Arrow")) and not(contains(defName, "Melee")) and ( contains(defName, "Pistol") or contains(defName, "Revolver") or contains(defName, "SMG") or contains(defName, "PDW") or contains(defName, "Shotgun") or contains(defName, "ShortShells") or contains(defName, "Carbine") or contains(defName, "Sidearm") or contains(defName, "Submachine") ) ]/recipeUsers

Defs/RecipeDef[ recipeUsers/li[ text()="WeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="AdvWeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="MechWeaponCraftingWorkTable" or text()="WeaponsBench" or text()="HeavyArmsBench" or text()="GunsmithingBench" ] and not(starts-with(defName, "Build_RN")) and not(contains(defName, "Sword")) and not(contains(defName, "Knife")) and not(contains(defName, "Axe")) and not(contains(defName, "Mace")) and not(contains(defName, "Hammer")) and not(contains(defName, "Spear")) and not(contains(defName, "Club")) and not(contains(defName, "Blade")) and not(contains(defName, "Crossbow")) and not(contains(defName, "Bow_")) and not(contains(defName, "_Bow")) and not(contains(defName, "Arrow")) and not(contains(defName, "Melee")) and ( contains(defName, "Rifle") or contains(defName, "Sniper") or contains(defName, "DMR") or contains(defName, "Marksman") or contains(defName, "Bullpup") or contains(defName, "AssaultRifle") or contains(defName, "BattleRifle") or contains(defName, "BoltAction") or contains(defName, "Gun") or contains(defName, "Firearm") ) ]/recipeUsers
